findings.detail: 8 nodes, 8 edges. All labels <=4 words. All five in-scope concepts (retry loop, corrective message, retry counter, max retries, fallback response) represented in node labels or subtitles. flowchart TD chosen correctly for a branching+loop intent. classDef palette matches project spec: start=blue, auto=purple, done=green, fallback=orange. Loop-back edge G-->A modelled correctly. No concept drift detected — no out-of-scope concepts (no exponential backoff, tenacity, async). Decision diamonds C and G use clean labels without span subtitles to avoid html-in-diamond render issues. Font sizes raised to 12px on subtitles for legibility. nodeSpacing=40 and rankSpacing=50 set for breathing room.
